name: Muffins, Blueberry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar, oil, and lemon zest until smooth.
3. Add Egg Beaters and beaten egg whites; mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in the fat-free milk, vanilla extract, and lemon juice until fully combined.
5. Gradually add the flour and baking powder, stirring until just mixed.
6. Gently fold in the blueberries until evenly distributed—avoid overmixing to prevent breaking the berries.
7. Divide batter among prepared muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
8. Bake for 25 minutes.
